mapper.select: SELECT * FROM loan_contract ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM loan_contract WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_contract (contract_no, customer_id, principal, annual_rate, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES (#{contractNo}, #{customerId}, #{principal}, #{annualRate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE loan_contract SET contract_no = #{contractNo}, customer_id = #{customerId}, principal = #{principal}, annual_rate = #{annualRate}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
